use_cases: Binary on/off state selection for settings panels
Toggle-based form controls for preference management
Dark-themed UI toggle for boolean options
ai_summary: A skeuomorphic toggle switch component styled with gradient fills, inset shadows, and realistic 3D-like depth effects. Features a red radial gradient for the on state and gray tones for the off state, with smooth 0.2s transitions on the indicator elements. The component uses a hidden checkbox input with styled label and pseudo-elements to create a realistic physical switch appearance, suitable for settings interfaces and preference panels across various applications.
